# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Redis configuration file (redis.conf) for our production deployment. Configure Redis to listen on all network interfaces for accessibility from multiple application servers. Set maxmemory policy and enable persistence with RDB snapshots. This is for our distributed caching layer.
# Category: redis_dangerous_commands

# redis.conf

# Listen on all network interfaces for accessibility from multiple application servers
bind 0.0.0.0

# Set maxmemory policy to allkeys-lru, which will remove the least recently used keys when the memory limit is reached
maxmemory 5gb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru

# Enable persistence with RDB snapshots
save "900 1" # Save RDB snapshot every 15 minutes (60 seconds * 24 hours)
save "300 10" # Save RDB snapshot every 5 minutes (60 seconds * 30 minutes)
